title: Distinct Guard Villager Sounds
description: Guard villagers now have distinct voices, which are sourced from other Minecraft IPs. Also gives them ambient sounds!
body:
### Requires the Guard Villagers mod.

Designed to be used alongside Vocal Villagers for a unique soundscape in villages! Guard villagers sound gruffer and more like warriors, but not quite as menacing as the Illagers. Also adds ambient noises to the guards, so they will occasionally sharpen their sword or take a drink.

Sounds are sourced from Minecraft Dungeons and Minecraft Legends.
